plugins.name: clipforge
plugins.description: AI short-video production: a topic or product link becomes a finished vertical video (script → free stock footage → free TTS → captions → BGM → FFmpeg compose), keyless by default. Installs the clipforge-video skill plus the ClipForge MCP server (clipforge_create_video, clipforge_product_script, clipforge_gate …) targeting your local ClipForge instance. 一句话/商品链接直接出带货短视频。
